name: InvisibleHand
short_description: In the bustling tavern, a variety of people are gathered. It's time to showcase true thieving skills!
detailed_description:
When there is a problem downloading the game, please set the language of the Steam client to English first. We are currently working on resolving this issue. We apologize for any inconvenience caused

-Randomly appearing characters and the items they carry

-Dozens of different characters and hundreds of different items

-Each character has ten items of varying values

-Thief's insight: Be quick, your time is very limited; every extra second increases the chance of being discovered

-Thief's insight: Be steady, your movements must be very careful; collisions between items can alert your target

-Thief's insight: Be Decisive, obtaining the most valuable items is only the second goal; the first goal is to avoid being caught; strike when the time is right

Steal from everyone! Become a legend in the tavern!

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Russian
